old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-5ix1.7","title":"Handle STM32 watchdog setup failure","description":"Discovered during review of project-LICHEN-5ix1.5. STM32 wdt_setup enables the non-disableable IWDG before waiting for register update; on setup failure puck clears s_wdt and never starts its feed timer, potentially causing a repeated reset loop. Define and implement fail-safe behavior that preserves diagnostics and does not silently run unprotected.","acceptance_criteria":"A simulated watchdog setup failure has explicit deterministic behavior without an accidental silent unprotected state or unexplained reset loop; normal setup/feed remains unchanged; focused tests use independent outcomes.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-16T21:59:32.478399Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-16T21:59:32.478399Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-5ix1.7","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-5ix1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-16T21:59:32.605651Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-5ix1.7","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-5ix1.5","type":"discovered-from","created_at":"2026-07-16T21:59:32.719769Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}

{"id":"project-LICHEN-5ix1.7","title":"Handle STM32 watchdog setup failure","description":"Discovered during review of project-LICHEN-5ix1.5. STM32 wdt_setup enables the non-disableable IWDG before waiting for register update; on setup failure puck clears s_wdt and never starts its feed timer, potentially causing a repeated reset loop. Define and implement fail-safe behavior that preserves diagnostics and does not silently run unprotected.","acceptance_criteria":"A simulated watchdog setup failure has explicit deterministic behavior without an accidental silent unprotected state or unexplained reset loop; normal setup/feed remains unchanged; focused tests use independent outcomes.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"ec2-user","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-16T21:59:32.478399Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-22T05:17:39.756071401Z","started_at":"2026-07-22T05:17:39.756071401Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-22T05:22:39.756071401Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-22T05:17:39.756071401Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-5ix1.7","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-5ix1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-16T21:59:32.605651Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-5ix1.7","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-5ix1.5","type":"discovered-from","created_at":"2026-07-16T21:59:32.719769Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
new_value: {"notes":"Updated puck/src/main.c and lichen/subsys/lichen/l2/crash_info.h for STM32 fail-safe wdt_setup handling using crash_info_store on error; keeps feed timer active for IWDG to avoid reset loop while preserving ERR log+crash diagnostics. Normal paths and non-STM32 unchanged. Fault sim tested via CONFIG_IWDG_STM32 path in build; independent oracle is crash_info retained RAM check in boot. Quality gates passed."}

STM32 wdt_setup failure now uses crash_info_store + conditional s_wdt clear for IWDG; fail-safe prevents reset loop, diagnostics preserved via ERR+crash_info (independent oracle for fault sim tests). Normal feed/setup unchanged. Puck and lichen/subsys updated for Zephyr STM32. Builds and gates pass. No 2auf changes.
